tasks.description: Explain the paper's problem, method, assumptions, and evidence without critique.
tasks.completion_predicate: Accurate anchored whole-paper comprehension artifact exists.

tasks.description: Map claimed contributions to sections, theorems, equations, and experiments.
tasks.completion_predicate: Every central contribution has resolving anchors.

tasks.description: Audit central claims for support, scope, assumptions, and contradictions.
tasks.completion_predicate: Central claims have anchored support assessments.

tasks.description: Audit definitions, theorem statements, proof dependencies, and formal scope.
tasks.completion_predicate: Central theory claims receive anchored scrutiny.

tasks.description: Audit datasets, baselines, metrics, uncertainty, ablations, and reporting.
tasks.completion_predicate: Empirical claims and limitations are anchored.

tasks.description: Identify novelty questions that require controlled literature research.
tasks.completion_predicate: Decision-relevant broker queries are scoped without searching directly.

tasks.description: Interpret admissible broker evidence for related-work and novelty claims.
tasks.completion_predicate: External claims cite verified broker source IDs only.

tasks.description: Interpret published validator evidence and its decision relevance.
tasks.completion_predicate: Validator evidence is interpreted rather than copied.

tasks.description: Calibrate each concern severity to affected claims and decision impact.
tasks.completion_predicate: Concern severity is consistent and actionable.

tasks.description: Choose independent axis, overall, and confidence scores from evidence.
tasks.completion_predicate: Scores match prose and overall is not averaged.

tasks.description: Assemble immutable official review version 1 from completed audits.
tasks.completion_predicate: Official review schema passes and all weaknesses have anchors.

tasks.description: Run the completion gate and emit the corrected official review.
tasks.completion_predicate: Review checker passes with matching concern ledger.
